series_metadata.series_title: Contractor, Construction Manager, and Architect Evaluations
series_metadata.series_description: All paper or electronic evaluations of work and performance done by a trade contractor construction manager, architect, or other professional firm engage on an agency project.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 3 years after project financial close., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
